text: 当你某日想去一个地方，你会？
optionA: 事先计划好了，然后再去
text_en: When you want to go somewhere for the day, do you?
optionB_en: Go first and then play it by ear

text: 如果你是一位老师，你愿教？
text_en: If you were a teacher, would you rather teach?

text: 遇到问题时，你通常喜欢？
text_en: When you run into a problem, you usually prefer to?

text: 你认为？
optionA: 很早就应该开始为聚会、约会等做准备
optionB: 不必先做准备，去了以后见机行事
text_en: Do you think that?
optionA_en: You should start preparing for parties or dates well in advance
optionB_en: There's no need to prepare; just go and see what happens

text: 你通常和谁相处得更好？
text_en: Who do you usually get along with better?

text: 你更多时候是？
text_en: More often, are you?
optionA_en: Led by your heart over your head
optionB_en: Led by your head over your heart

text: 当你和一群人在一起时，你常常是更愿意？
optionA: 加入到大家的谈话中去
text_en: When you're with a group, do you usually prefer to?
optionB_en: Talk alone with people you know well

text: 你最喜欢怎样做事情？
text_en: How do you like to do things most?

text: 你希望自己被看作是一个？
text_en: How would you like to be seen?

text: 当别人问你一个问题时，你经常会？
text_en: When someone asks you a question, do you often?
optionB_en: Think it over in your head first

text: 你喜欢与谁打交道？
optionA: 常有出人意料想法的人
text_en: Who do you prefer to deal with?
optionB_en: People who act by common sense

text: 按日程表办事？
text_en: Following a schedule?

text: 你觉得通常别人？
optionA: 要花很长的时间才能和你相熟
text_en: Do you find that usually others?
optionA_en: Take a long time to get to know you

text: 为如何过周末订一个计划？
text_en: Making a plan for the weekend?

text: 下列哪一个评价更适合你？
text_en: Which fits you better?

text: 更多的时候，你倾向于？
text_en: More often, do you tend to?

text: 在日常工作中，你更喜欢？
optionA: 在时间紧迫的情况下，争分夺秒地工作
optionB: 做好提前量，尽早把工作做完
text_en: In daily work, do you prefer to?
optionA_en: Work under time pressure, against the clock
optionB_en: Get a head start and finish early

text: 你更愿把谁作为朋友？
text_en: Who would you rather have as a friend?
optionA_en: Someone who always has new ideas

text: 你是一个？
optionA: 兴趣广泛，什么都想尝试的人
optionB: 专注的投入某个兴趣的人
text_en: Are you?
optionA_en: Someone with wide interests who wants to try everything
optionB_en: Someone who focuses deeply on one interest

text: 当你有一项特别的工作要做时，你喜欢先？
text_en: When you have a particular task to do, do you like to first?
optionA_en: See the big picture of the work
optionB_en: Identify the steps that must be done

text: 你更接受？
text_en: Do you respond more to?

text: 当你为了消遣而阅读时，你？
optionA: 欣赏作者奇特、独创的表达
optionB: 喜欢作者的表达直接、明确
text_en: When you read for fun, do you?
optionA_en: Enjoy the author's unusual, original way of saying things
optionB_en: Prefer the author to be direct and clear

text: 新认识你的人怎样了解到你的兴趣所在？
optionB: 只有真正和你熟悉以后才能
text_en: How do new acquaintances learn about your interests?
optionB_en: Only after they really know you

text: 在旅行时，你喜欢？
optionB: 事先知道一天中该做的事
text_en: When traveling, do you prefer to?
optionB_en: Know in advance what you'll do each day

text: 做许多人都做的事时，你喜欢？
text_en: When doing what many people do, do you like to?

text: 多数人说你是一个？
text_en: Do most people say you are?
optionA_en: Someone who doesn't open up easily

text: 你更倾向或喜欢（指你现在已具有的，而非向往的）？
text_en: Which do you prefer (what you are, not what you wish)?

text: 你更倾向或喜欢（指你现在已具有的，而非向往的）？
text_en: Which do you prefer (what you are, not what you wish)?

text: 你更倾向或喜欢（指你现在已具有的，而非向往的）？

text: 和一群人在一起聚会通常会让你感到？
text_en: Does a party with a group usually make you feel?

text: 你在做一个决定时，更多地会？
text_en: When making a decision, do you more often?

text: 通常你更喜欢？
text_en: Do you usually prefer to?
optionA_en: Plan in advance what to do
optionB_en: Play it by ear when the time comes

text: 当你一个人在家时，你？
optionA: 能够沉静在自己的思维中
optionB: 总觉得应该做点什么事情
text_en: When you're home alone, do you?
optionA_en: Enjoy being absorbed in your own thoughts
optionB_en: Feel you should be doing something

text: 多数情况下，你？
text_en: Most of the time, do you?

text: 你通常？
text_en: Do you usually?

text: 你做事更倾向于？
optionA: 等到各方面的信息都全了以后再做计划
text_en: Do you tend to?
optionA_en: Wait until you have all the information before planning

text: 别人怎样和你交上朋友？
text_en: How do people become your friends?

text: 你通常喜欢上怎样的课程？
text_en: What kind of courses do you usually prefer?

text: 在聚会时，你？
text_en: At a party, do you?

text: 你觉得自己更倾向于是一个？
text_en: Do you see yourself more as?

text: 你？
optionA: 只同那些兴趣相同的人才能长谈
optionB: 只要愿意，和任何人都可以长聊
text_en: Do you?
optionA_en: Only have long talks with people who share your interests
optionB_en: Can chat at length with anyone if you want

text: 当你有一个报告需要在一个星期内交出时，你？
optionA: 常留出足够的时间并能提早完成
optionB: 常常是在最后一刻及时赶出来
text_en: When you have a report due in a week, do you?
optionA_en: Often leave enough time and finish early
optionB_en: Often finish at the last minute

text: 哪一个对你来说是更高的评价？
text_en: Which is higher praise to you?

text: 你觉得按日程表办事？
text_en: Do you find following a schedule?

text: 你更愿在一个怎样的老板手下工作？
optionA: 态度亲切，但有时会感情用事
optionB: 态度严厉，但始终按逻辑办事
text_en: What kind of boss would you rather work for?

text: 在完成一项大任务时，你常常是？
text_en: When finishing a big task, do you often?
optionA_en: Consider the next step as you go
optionB_en: Think through each step in advance

text: 在社交场合，你通常觉得？
optionA: 很难和不认识的人进行交谈
optionB: 很容易和多数人谈笑风生
text_en: In social situations, do you usually find it?
optionA_en: Hard to talk to people you don't know
optionB_en: Easy to chat and laugh with most people

text: 你常常是？
optionA: 按已经有效的方法做事
optionB: 尝试一下有没有更好的办法
text_en: Do you often?
optionA_en: Do things in ways that already work
optionB_en: Try to see if there's a better way

text: 你更喜欢按什么做事情？
text_en: Do you prefer to do things by?
